elements.title: May Morning
elements.contents: ... that Edith Maryon's fireplace relief May Morning (pictured) was inspired by an ode by William Wordsworth?

elements.title: Ukrainian National Union
elements.contents: ... that in 1939 the Ukrainian National Union's newspaper waited for the rise of a Ukrainian Mussolini or Hitler?

elements.title: Battle of Treviso
elements.contents: ... that, following the Battle of Treviso, King Ildibad had Uraias murdered after Uraias's wife insulted Ildibad's wife in a bath house?

elements.title: attractions at Six Flags Great America
elements.contents: ... that the attractions at Six Flags Great America include the world's first inverted roller coaster and a double-decker carousel?

elements.title: Max Balegde
elements.contents: ... that a UK prime minister's comments about gender irked Max Balegde into organising a fundraiser event?

elements.title: Robert E. Lee cake
elements.contents: ... that recipes for Robert E. Lee cake appeared in many cookbooks of the American South in the late 19th century?

elements.title: René Barbera
elements.contents: ... that tenor René Barbera sang a leading role in his first opera when he was eleven years old?

elements.title: lead climbing
elements.contents: ... that lead climbing is planned to be a standalone medal event at the 2028 Summer Olympics?

elements.title: a half-marathon
elements.contents: ... that a Chinese robot beat the world record for a half-marathon?
